title: Teaching agents product design at Vercel
summary: Teaching agents product design at Vercel
whyItMatters: Coding agents can produce working UI fast, but what's harder is a different shape. They can copy your product's style, match its patterns, and try to follow its conventions. What they cannot do is understand why those patterns exist. Code shows agents what shipped, not why one component, phrase, or interaction became your standard. That reasoning lives in d…
